title: Travel Wings USA - Modern Lead-Gen Travel Platform
description: Travel Wings USA is a fully redesigned, modern lead-generation travel platform for a USA-based travel agency located at 1724 Woodlawn Dr Suite 12, Gwynn Oak, MD 21207 (phone: +1 410-298-4500, email: info@travelwingsusa.com). The platform showcases Umrah packages, Hajj packages, air ticketing (flights to Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, India, Europe, UK), and curated vacation tour packages (Baghdad, Singapore, Paris, London, Malaysia, Turkey, Switzerland, UAE, and more). All conversion happens through inquiry forms, phone calls, and WhatsApp - no direct payments. Design is inspired by Tourm and Journea: full-screen hero sliders, coverflow destination carousels, modern card grids, and swiper-based tour sliders.

globalHeaderBlocks.name: Top Info Bar
globalHeaderBlocks.description: Slim top bar (dark navy background) showing address '1724 Woodlawn Dr Suite 12, Gwynn Oak, MD 21207', email 'info@travelwingsusa.com', and social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, Google). Hidden on mobile.

globalHeaderBlocks.name: Main Navigation Bar
globalHeaderBlocks.description: Sticky white navigation bar with Travel Wings USA logo on the left, centered menu links (Home, Umrah Services, Hajj Packages, Air Ticketing with dropdown for Pakistan/Saudi Arabia/UAE/India/Europe/UK flights, Destinations, Blog, About, Contact), and right-side CTA buttons: a prominent orange 'WhatsApp' button and a blue 'Call: +1 410-298-4500' button. Mobile hamburger menu with offcanvas drawer.

globalHeaderBlocks.name: Floating WhatsApp Button
globalHeaderBlocks.description: Fixed circular WhatsApp icon button pinned to the bottom-right corner across all pages, opening WhatsApp chat with the agency. Appears on scroll and persists at all times on mobile and desktop.

globalFooterBlocks.name: Footer Main Content
globalFooterBlocks.description: Four-column footer with: (1) Company column - logo, short brand description, social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, Google); (2) Quick Links column - Home, About Us, Destinations, Blog, Contact; (3) Services column - Umrah Services, Hajj Packages, Air Ticketing, Vacation Tours, Flight to Pakistan, Flight to UK; (4) Contact column - address '1724 Woodlawn Dr Suite 12, Gwynn Oak, MD 21207', phone '+1 410-298-4500', fax '410-298-5500', email 'info@travelwingsusa.com'.

globalFooterBlocks.name: Footer Bottom Bar
globalFooterBlocks.description: Slim copyright bar at the very bottom with '2025 Travel Wings USA. All Rights Reserved.' text on left and links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Service on the right.

pages.name: Home
pages.description: The main landing page designed to inspire and convert. Features a full-screen hero slider with travel imagery, a quick flight inquiry form, service category icons, a popular destinations coverflow carousel, an about section, a featured tours slider, customer testimonials, a blog preview strip, and a final call-to-action banner. Inspired by Tourm and Journea homepage layouts.

blocks.name: Hero Slider
blocks.description: Full-screen auto-playing image slider with 3 slides showing inspiring travel photography. Each slide has an animated headline (e.g. 'The First Step of Your Travel Expedition', 'Your Umrah Journey Departing Worldwide', 'Discover, Dream, Travel'), a subtitle in a script/handwritten font in orange (#FF9D3D), and two CTA buttons: primary 'Explore Tours' (blue #015FC9) and secondary 'Get a Quote' (outline style). Arrows and dot pagination for navigation.

blocks.name: Flight Search Form Bar
blocks.description: A floating white card below the hero (overlapping it slightly) with tabs for 'One Way' and 'Round Trip'. Form fields: Name, Email, Phone (row 1); From city, To city, Departure date, Number of Passengers (row 2 - one way) or From, To, Departure, Return date, Passengers (round trip). A prominent blue 'Get Flight Enquiry' submit button. Sends lead notification to admin.

blocks.name: Service Categories
blocks.description: A section titled 'Choose Our Tour Types and Enjoy Now' with 5 icon-based category cards in a horizontal grid: (01) Umrah Services, (02) Hajj Packages, (03) Air Ticketing, (04) Cruise Tours, (05) Vacations. Each card has a numbered badge, an icon, title, and links to the relevant page.

blocks.name: About Snapshot
blocks.description: Two-column section: left side has a collage of 3 overlapping travel photos (staggered/rotated layout like Journea's about section); right side has a subtitle 'GET TO KNOW US', heading 'Experience the World with Our Company', description text about Travel Wings USA offering Umrah, Hajj, air ticketing, and vacations, and a 'Learn More' button linking to /about.

blocks.name: Popular Destinations Carousel
blocks.description: Section titled 'Popular Destinations' with a coverflow/3D swiper carousel of destination cards. Each card shows a high-quality image, destination name (e.g. Baghdad, Singapore, Paris, London, Makkah, Dubai, Malaysia, Turkey, Switzerland), and a 'View All' button. Cards in the center appear larger, side cards are angled/scaled down for depth effect.

blocks.name: Featured Tours Slider
blocks.description: Section titled 'Most Popular Tours' on a textured background image. Horizontal swiper slider with tour cards: each card has a destination image, tour name (e.g. 'Baghdad City Package', 'Singapore City Escape', 'Paris Getaway Package', 'London Package 7 Nights', 'Umrah Package 2025'), duration badge (e.g. '4 Days 3 Nights'), star rating, and a 'Get Quote' button that anchors to the inquiry form. No pricing shown.

blocks.name: Why Choose Us
blocks.description: Section titled 'Why Choose Us?' with 6 icon-box cards in a 2x3 or 3x2 grid: Experienced Team, Umrah and Hajj Specialists, Air Ticketing Experts, 24/7 Customer Support, Personalized Service, Trusted by Thousands. Each card has a colored icon background, title, and short description.

blocks.name: Customer Testimonials
blocks.description: Section titled 'What Our Travelers Are Saying' with a swiper slider of testimonial cards. Each card shows star rating, quote text, customer name, and origin location. Cards have a white rounded shadow box design like Journea's testimonials.

blocks.name: Latest Blog Preview
blocks.description: Section titled 'Latest Travel Tips and News' showing 3-4 blog post cards in a horizontal grid. Each card has a full-height background image with text overlaid at the bottom: date badge, article title, and short excerpt. On hover, a card scales slightly. Links to /blog.

blocks.name: Final CTA Banner
blocks.description: Full-width banner section with a bold heading 'Ready to Plan Your Dream Trip?', supporting text 'Contact us today and let our experts create the perfect package for you.', and two side-by-side CTA buttons: blue 'Request a Quote' (links to /contact) and orange 'Call Now: +1 410-298-4500' (tel link). Background uses a travel-themed image with a dark overlay.

pages.name: Destinations
pages.description: All-tours listing page showing every available travel package in a searchable, filterable grid. Includes sidebar filters for destination region, duration, and category. Each tour card shows image, tour name, location, duration, and a 'View Details' button. Mirrors the structure of travelwingsusa.com/all-tours/ with a modern visual upgrade.

blocks.name: Page Hero Banner
blocks.description: Full-width page banner with a background travel image, page title 'All Destinations and Packages', and breadcrumb navigation (Home > Destinations). Uses a Ken Burns zoom-in effect on the background image.

blocks.name: Filter and Search Bar
blocks.description: Horizontal filter bar with: a text search input, a 'Category' dropdown (Umrah, Hajj, Air Ticketing, Vacation Tours, Cruise), a 'Destination' dropdown (Iraq, Malaysia, Paris, UK, UAE, Spiritual Journey, Singapore, Turkey, Switzerland), a 'Duration' dropdown (3-7 days), and a 'Sort By' selector. Results count displayed dynamically.

blocks.name: Tours Grid
blocks.description: Responsive grid of tour cards (3 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile). Each card shows: destination image, category badge (e.g. 'Umrah', 'Vacation'), tour title, location with pin icon, duration with clock icon, and a 'View Details' CTA button. Sample tours: Baghdad City Package (4 Days 3 Nights, Iraq), Singapore City Escape (4 Days 3 Nights), Paris Getaway Package (4 Days 3 Nights), London Package 7 Nights, Umrah Package 2025, Hajj Package 2025, Malaysia Tour, Turkey Package, UAE Dubai Package, Switzerland Tour.

pages.name: Tour Details
pages.description: Individual tour package detail page with full itinerary, image gallery, package inclusions/exclusions, and a sticky quote request form. Covers all tour types: Umrah packages, Hajj packages, vacation tours, and air ticketing flights.

blocks.name: Tour Page Hero
blocks.description: Full-width banner with tour name as heading, breadcrumb (Home > Destinations > Tour Name), and a cinematic background image of the destination with dark overlay.

blocks.name: Tour Image Gallery
blocks.description: Main large image with 4-5 thumbnail images below in a grid. Clicking any thumbnail or the main image opens a lightbox fullscreen viewer. Shows multiple high-resolution photos of the destination.

blocks.name: Tour Overview and Highlights
blocks.description: Left-side main content area showing: tour title, key info badges (duration, destination, group size, category), short description paragraph, and a bulleted Highlights list. Below that, tab-based sections for Overview, Itinerary, Inclusions/Exclusions, and FAQs.

blocks.name: Day-by-Day Itinerary
blocks.description: Accordion-style day-by-day itinerary inside the 'Itinerary' tab. Each accordion item shows 'Day X: Title' as the header and expands to show activities, sightseeing, meals, and hotel info for that day.

blocks.name: Inclusions and Exclusions
blocks.description: Two-column checklist inside the 'Inclusions/Exclusions' tab: green checkmark list for what IS included (visa, hotel, transfers, meals, guide, etc.) and red X list for what is NOT included (personal expenses, optional tours, etc.).

blocks.name: Sticky Quote Request Form
blocks.description: Right-side sticky sidebar form titled 'Request a Free Quote'. Fields: Full Name, Email Address, Phone Number, Travel Date (date picker), Number of Travelers, Special Requirements (textarea). Submit button: blue 'Send Inquiry'. On submission, admin receives email notification and user receives a 'Thank You' confirmation email. Also shows 'Or Call Us' with phone number and a WhatsApp button.

blocks.name: Related Tours
blocks.description: Section at the bottom titled 'You May Also Like' with 3 related tour cards in a horizontal row, each linking to another tour detail page.

pages.name: Blog
pages.description: Travel blog listing page with articles about travel tips, destination guides, Umrah preparation, and more. Designed to attract organic SEO traffic and funnel readers toward tour packages.

blocks.name: Blog Page Hero
blocks.description: Full-width hero banner with title 'Travel Blog and Tips', breadcrumb, and a travel-themed background image.

blocks.name: Blog Grid
blocks.description: 3-column card grid of blog posts. Each card has: full-height featured image with a dark overlay, date badge (top-right), article title, short excerpt, category tag (e.g. 'Umrah Tips', 'Destination Guide', 'Travel Hacks'), and a 'Read More' link. Hover effect scales image slightly. Sample articles: 'How to Prepare for Umrah 2025', 'Top 5 Things to Do in Dubai', 'Complete Guide to Flights from USA to Pakistan', 'Paris on a Budget: Travel Tips'.

blocks.name: Newsletter Signup Strip
blocks.description: A full-width inline banner section below the grid with heading 'Get Travel Tips in Your Inbox', short description, and an email input + 'Subscribe' button (pill-shaped). Collects emails for travel news and deals.

pages.name: Blog Article
pages.description: Individual blog post page with full article content, author info, social share buttons, and a sidebar with related tour packages to convert readers into leads.

blocks.name: Article Header
blocks.description: Full-width featured image with article title, category tag, publish date, author name, and estimated reading time overlaid or displayed just below.

blocks.name: Article Content and Sidebar
blocks.description: Two-column layout: left/main column (70%) contains the full formatted article text with headings, paragraphs, and embedded images; right sidebar (30%) contains a 'Related Packages' widget showing 2-3 tour cards relevant to the article topic, each with a 'Get Quote' button, and a 'Need Help?' box with phone and WhatsApp links.

blocks.name: Related Articles
blocks.description: Section at the bottom of the article titled 'More Travel Reads' showing 3 related blog post cards in a grid.

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Company profile page for Travel Wings USA, presenting the agency's story, values, credentials, team, and a strong CTA to contact or request a quote.

blocks.name: About Page Hero
blocks.description: Full-width banner with title 'About Travel Wings USA', breadcrumb navigation, and a travel-themed background.

blocks.name: Our Story Section
blocks.description: Two-column section with a travel photo collage on the left (3 overlapping images in a staggered layout) and text on the right: 'GET TO KNOW US' subtitle, heading 'Experience the World with Travel Wings USA', description of the agency - a Maryland-based travel company specializing in Umrah/Hajj packages, international flights, and custom vacation tours, serving the community since its founding. Includes key stats: number of happy customers, destinations, years of experience.

blocks.name: Mission and Values
blocks.description: Full-width or alternating section with heading 'Our Mission', a paragraph about providing seamless, personalized travel experiences especially for spiritual journeys (Umrah, Hajj), and 4 value cards: Customer First, Expert Guidance, Transparent Service, 24/7 Support.

blocks.name: Team Section
blocks.description: Grid of team member cards (3-4 members) each with a professional photo, name, job title (e.g. 'Travel Consultant', 'Umrah Specialist'), and a brief bio. Clean white card design with subtle shadow.

blocks.name: About CTA Banner
blocks.description: Full-width CTA section at the bottom with heading 'Ready to Start Your Journey?', supporting text, and two buttons: 'Request a Quote' and 'Call +1 410-298-4500'. Dark background with travel image overlay.

pages.name: Admin Dashboard
pages.description: A password-protected backend admin panel where the Travel Wings USA team can view, manage, and track all incoming leads from every inquiry form on the site. Accessible only after entering the admin password.

blocks.name: Admin Login Gate
blocks.description: A centered login card shown before the dashboard. Contains the Travel Wings USA logo, a 'Admin Access' heading, a password input field, and a 'Login' button. On correct password entry, stores session in localStorage and shows the dashboard. On wrong password, shows an error message.

blocks.name: Admin Stats Bar
blocks.description: Top summary row showing 4 stat cards: Total Leads (count), New Leads (uncontacted), Contacted Leads, and Closed/Converted Leads. Each card has a colored icon and count number. Updates dynamically from the database.

blocks.name: Leads Management Table
blocks.description: Full-width data table listing all leads with columns: Date/Time, Name, Email, Phone, Inquiry Type (Tour Quote / Flight Enquiry / Contact Form / Newsletter), Message (truncated with expand), Status (color-coded badge: New=blue, Contacted=orange, Closed=green). Each row has action buttons: 'Mark Contacted', 'Mark Closed', and 'Delete'. Table supports search by name/email and filter by status and inquiry type. Rows sorted by newest first.

blocks.name: Lead Detail Modal
blocks.description: Clicking any lead row opens a modal/drawer showing the full lead details: all submitted form fields, timestamps, current status, and a notes text area where admin can add internal notes about that lead. Modal has 'Update Status' dropdown and 'Save Notes' button.

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: Contact page with multiple communication options including a detailed inquiry form, real contact details, an embedded map, and prominent phone/WhatsApp CTAs.

blocks.name: Contact Page Hero
blocks.description: Full-width banner with title 'Contact Travel Wings USA', subtitle 'We are here to help you plan your perfect trip', and breadcrumb navigation.

blocks.name: Contact Details Cards
blocks.description: Row of 3 info cards with icons: (1) Location - '1724 Woodlawn Dr Suite 12, Gwynn Oak, MD 21207'; (2) Phone - '+1 (410) 298-4500 / Fax: 410-298-5500'; (3) Email - 'info@travelwingsusa.com'. Each card has a blue icon background circle and a link.

blocks.name: Contact Form and Map
blocks.description: Two-column section: left side has a general inquiry form with fields Name, Email, Phone, Subject, Message, and a 'Send Message' button. Right side has an embedded Google Map centered on '1724 Woodlawn Dr, Gwynn Oak, MD 21207'. On form submission, admin is notified and user gets an auto-reply email.

blocks.name: Direct Contact CTA Strip
blocks.description: Full-width colored strip (blue or orange gradient) with heading 'Prefer to Talk Directly?' and two large buttons: 'Call Now: +1 410-298-4500' (with phone icon) and 'Chat on WhatsApp' (with WhatsApp icon). Designed for immediate lead conversion.

features.name: Lead Capture Forms with Resend Emails
features.description: Multiple inquiry form types across the platform: (1) Flight Enquiry Form on homepage with One Way/Round Trip tabs capturing name, email, phone, from/to cities, departure/return date, passenger count; (2) Tour Quote Request Form on every tour detail page capturing name, email, phone, travel date, number of travelers, special requirements; (3) General Contact Form on /contact page. All form submissions POST to /api/inquiry backend route which saves the lead to database and uses Resend API to send: (a) a detailed lead notification email to admin at info@travelwingsusa.com and (b) a branded Thank You confirmation email to the user's email address.

features.name: Admin Lead Management Backend
features.description: A backend-powered admin dashboard at /admin for the Travel Wings USA team to manage all incoming leads. Features: password-protected login (hardcoded password stored in env variable ADMIN_PASSWORD), full leads table with search/filter, status management (New, Contacted, Closed), lead detail view with internal notes, and summary stats. Backend API routes: POST /api/inquiry (public - submit lead), GET /api/leads (admin - fetch all leads), PATCH /api/leads/:id (admin - update status/notes), DELETE /api/leads/:id (admin - delete lead). All data persisted in database.

features.name: Direct Communication Channels
features.description: Call Now and WhatsApp buttons appear prominently in: the main navigation bar, every tour detail page sidebar form, the contact page, about page CTA, and as a persistent floating WhatsApp bubble on all pages. Phone number: +1 410-298-4500. Clicking WhatsApp opens a pre-filled chat.

features.name: Dynamic Tour Catalog
features.description: A complete catalog of travel packages including: Umrah Services (2025 packages departing worldwide), Hajj Packages (seasonal), Air Ticketing (one-way and round-trip flights to Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, India, Europe/UK), and Vacation Tours (Baghdad City Package, Singapore City Escape, Paris Getaway, London 7-Night Package, Malaysia Tour, Turkey Package, UAE/Dubai, Switzerland). All displayed with image galleries, itineraries, and inquiry forms. No pricing shown - all inquiries go through forms.

features.name: Detailed Tour Pages
features.description: Each tour has a dedicated detail page with: cinematic hero banner, lightbox image gallery, key info badges (duration, destination, group size), tab-based sections (Overview, Day-by-Day Itinerary via accordion, Inclusions/Exclusions checklists, FAQs), a sticky sidebar quote form, and related tour suggestions at the bottom.

features.name: SEO Blog Engine
features.description: A travel blog for publishing SEO-optimized articles on topics like Umrah preparation, travel tips for Pakistan, Dubai guides, UK travel, Hajj guides, etc. Blog posts are categorized (Umrah Tips, Destination Guides, Travel Hacks, Air Travel), searchable, and each post has a related packages sidebar to convert readers into leads.

features.name: Mobile-First Responsive Design
features.description: Fully responsive layout optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop. Mobile navigation uses an offcanvas hamburger drawer. The floating WhatsApp button is always visible on mobile. Forms are touch-friendly with appropriately sized inputs. Images are lazy-loaded and optimized for fast performance.

features.name: Interactive Destination Sliders
features.description: Swiper.js-powered interactive carousels: (1) Full-screen hero slider with crossfade transitions and animated text overlays; (2) Coverflow 3D destination carousel on the homepage with perspective depth effect; (3) Horizontal tour card slider for featured packages; (4) Testimonial swiper with card-based review display. All sliders are touch/swipe enabled on mobile.

features.name: Search and Filter System
features.description: On the Destinations page: search by keyword, filter by category (Umrah, Hajj, Vacation, Air Ticketing, Cruise), filter by destination region (Iraq, Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, UK, Europe, Malaysia, Singapore, Turkey, Switzerland, France), filter by duration (3-7+ days), and sort options (Recently Added, Top Rated, Shortest Duration). Results update dynamically.

stylingGuidelines: Brand colors: primary blue #015FC9, accent orange #FF9D3D, dark navy #16243D, white background. Font: Plus Jakarta Sans for all text (headings and body). Rounded pill-shaped CTA buttons (30px border-radius). Modern clean design inspired by Tourm and Journea: large full-screen hero images, bold headings, subtle card shadows, smooth hover transitions, and generous white space. High-quality travel photography throughout.
technicalDetails: No direct payment gateway or pricing display. All conversion is through inquiry/quote forms and phone/WhatsApp CTAs. Email system: use Resend API for all transactional emails - on every form submission send (1) admin notification email to info@travelwingsusa.com with full lead details (name, phone, email, inquiry type, message) and (2) automated Thank You confirmation email to the user. Use Swiper.js for all carousels and sliders. Google Maps embed on contact page centered on Gwynn Oak MD. All images should be lazy-loaded. WhatsApp floating button should link to wa.me with pre-filled message. Backend API routes required: POST /api/inquiry (handles all form submissions, saves lead to DB, triggers Resend emails), GET /api/leads (admin only, returns all leads), PATCH /api/leads/:id (admin only, update lead status), DELETE /api/leads/:id (admin only). Admin dashboard at /admin protected by a simple hardcoded password login (no full auth system needed). All leads stored in database with fields: id, name, email, phone, inquiryType, message, status (new/contacted/closed), createdAt.
